examples: Consumers like being able to visually examine the color of the milk.
I grew flowers mostly—I didn't think about plants that weren't visually interesting.
The town is now turning its attention to making the sea-front more visually attractive.
Amputees and visually impaired athletes will now also be running the 26-mile, 385-yard, route.
It's there for those people who can't see the lights, like visually impaired or blind people.
